reason: Check the tooltip remains a semantic, accessible teleported floating surface.
Check type/build validation and dense-tooltip placement, cleanup, and overflow behavior.
Check the project bridge contract agrees across types, fallback bridge, store, and component.
Check remote-avatar failures degrade to a typed no-avatar result without UI errors.
Review each avatar data boundary and stale asynchronous result behavior.
Review new helpers against existing Git data-loading and caching patterns.
Check the implementation stays within the documented GitHub-only, no-email, no-persistence scope.
